steps.title: Focus on Miranda's role
steps.content: The passage says Viscardo wrote the letter, but his historical role would have remained insignificant without Miranda. It then explains that Miranda circulated the unpublished letter and shaped the text through edits and footnotes, so the main idea must center on Miranda's influence.

steps.title: Reject claims beyond the passage
steps.content: A wrongly says authorship is disputed. B exaggerates Miranda's role by making him the writer of most arguments. D shifts to the letter persuading people, an effect the passage does not discuss. The answer is C.
